definition_summary: Stage E: reads structured export observable_matrix.csv / observables.csv; maps Tp_K,tw_seconds,Dip_depth,FM_abs to five-column contract (identity numeric copy).
Dip_depth defaults from AFM_amp with Dip_depth_source afm_amp_residual if unset; FM_signed from FM_step_raw/FM_step_mag; FM_abs = abs(FM_signed). Not tanh/Gaussian in contract path.
notes_or_dependency: smooth/residual decomposition via analyzeAFM_FM_components when agingMetricMode direct

definition_summary: buildObservableMatrix emits Dip_depth and FM_abs per pause-run row for consolidation.
Historical run that produced archived aging_observable_dataset.csv used by old tau pipelines.
DeltaM_signed; dip_signed = DeltaM_signed - DeltaM_smooth; FM_signed physical sign; stage4 not stage5/stage6 summary.
notes_or_dependency: F6J uses consolidated scalar Dip_depth/FM_abs only

definition_summary: aging_observable_dataset; Dip_depth; FM_abs; stage4; baseline; residual; dip_component; AFM_like/FM_like via amp/step paths — see aging_measurement_definition_freeze.md.
notes_or_dependency: no independent R-era script located beyond consolidation + structured export
